direct_data_needed.need: physical timestep dt for each family
direct_data_needed.why: Converts tau_0/tau_1 and dwell-window statistics from model units into seconds.
direct_data_needed.how_to_use: Pass --dt-json dt.json with keys parity, x_loop, z_loop.

direct_data_needed.need: calibration labels or known state preparations
direct_data_needed.why: Maps hidden state 0/1 to even/odd parity or physical X/Z loop states and enables true assignment error/readout fidelity.
direct_data_needed.how_to_use: Pass --state-label-json for state names and use qcvv_calibrate.py for confusion matrices/fidelity.

direct_data_needed.need: raw or prepared I/Q traces with sample_dt and run/time metadata
direct_data_needed.why: Needed for physical drift analysis, raw trace dwell-time posteriors, repeated-readout/QND metrics, and model inference on new data.
direct_data_needed.status: not available in extracted model artifacts unless prepared bundles are accessible locally
direct_data_needed.how_to_use: Keep columns such as family, run_id, sequence_id, sample_index, t, I, Q, sample_dt.

direct_data_needed.why: Needed to quantify measurement backaction and QND repeatability rather than only decoder confidence.
direct_data_needed.status: not inferable from model artifacts alone
direct_data_needed.how_to_use: Prepare paired pre/post or repeated measurements and align them by run/sequence/time.

direct_data_needed.need: individual CNN-GRU/DMM prediction exports if you want prediction-level comparison for those baselines
direct_data_needed.why: The individual bundle has checkpoints and training metrics for some neural models, but no prediction NPZ for CNN-GRU/DMM in the current project files.
direct_data_needed.status: missing when prediction_npz is blank in artifact_inventory.csv
direct_data_needed.how_to_use: Run model inference/export on a shared held-out dataset, then rerun qcvv_extract.py.
